item.title: Salma Hayek, the actress, turned 58 on September 2nd
item.description:
She is known for such movies as Desperado ...
and The Eternals ...
and From Dusk Till Dawn ...
and Traffic ...
and Savages ...
and Once Upon A Time In Mexico ...
and Frida ...
and Spy Kids 3: Game Over ...
and After The Sunset ...
and Lonely Hearts ...
and Fair Game ...
and The Faculty ...
and many more.

Life lesson Edit: There is a spider in one of the images below. I forgot to mention it in the title, Im sorry.
So confused. ?
YES
I found a collection of weird things men have said about women. Above is the first one.
Number two!
...aaaand number three!
Spiderbro from my house.
David Tennant! <3
Not quite, but still funny
For the trans girls!
Pebbling, love it
I have this. Highly recommend
Ohno
Love this @Knightmage !
A much better take than not saying anything for sure

item.title: Images of Note: Five African Grey parrots
item.description:
*looks at camera*
This is not the only piss meme in this dump
There's the other one :)
Cursed
I hate it.
guys...do you...do....do you know....do you....
HELL YEAH LINUX!
I remember when twitter was good. That was a lovely day. That day was 20 September 2015 when PIgGate happened.
Every time someone says "getting rid of regulations will make y cheaper", they need someone to ask them "why would they want to make less money than they do now?"
It's Baguette!
Bridgerton!
Brimstone
Basket!
Bridgenorth!
Bremen!
Biscuit!
Breathmint!
Basement!
Backspace!
Broxburn!
Bathgate!
Ever notice how they're banning books written about things like the Holocaust and Slavery over in America? I wonder why they wouldn't want kids knowing that kinda thing? Just a reminder, the second to last living person born into slavery in America died after being hit by a car in 1972.
Boobies really are Superb!
WELCOME TO THE CUM PARK!
if wizards are analogous to computer programmers/hackers, this is the equivalent of shutting down a computer by...er...throwing a brick at it.
Poyo
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging

item.title: Taipan Bite - A Tragedy in Three Acts
item.description:
The Greek tragedy is a dark comedy wherein the protagonist suffers due to their own inherent character flaws. In our play, arrogance. This guy regularly went on hate-filled, misogynistic, racist, typo-ridden rants against anyone who disagreed with his practices or offered even a little criticism that could have prevented this outcome.
Inland Taipans are, drop-for-drop, the most venomous snake in the world. Despite their potency, they have never killed anyone. Cue South Carolina man. In case it needed any clarification, using bare hands to work with venomous snakes - called 'freehandling' - is inherently a horribly dangerous practice. Reptiles and mammals don't communicate in the same ways, and we misunderstand each others' behaviors all the time. No snake wants to bite a human maliciously, despite myths to the contrary. But any animal will defend themselves if they believe their life is at risk. Everything this man is saying in the video is incorrect - this young snake could bite him at any moment if it wanted to. All snakes want to do is hide or get away if possible, as this taipan is showing.
Begging for antivenom a few hours after the handling video was posted. As a result of freehandling the world's most venomous snake without even having access to antivenom, this man may lose his life. All of his animals have been euthanized, and he's drawn a ton of negative attention to these already misunderstood species. Here's the latest well-written piece from the media:
If you want to own venomous snakes, fine. But get formal training. Take precautions. Use tools. Have antivenom. Don't get one to be cool - no one will think you are. Don't get one for clicks or views on social media - you're likely to be maimed or killed. Don't get them on impulse - it takes a long time to plan and make connections for emergency response plans. And actually take care of them with the same love you have for your family dog or cat. The conditions his animals were kept in were apparently horrific. *Not celebrating a guy fighting for his life, but this serves as a stark warning against these unsafe practices. It also couldn't have happened to a better guy /s
item.dc:creator: ecologistguy

item.title: That’s a no from me, dawg
item.description: My contract is ending, but they want me to stay on another contract Currently work from home, M-F 830-5 New contract —5% pay cut (non-negotiable). Some shifts start at 5:30am and Can go as late as 10:30 pm. Must work 1 day of the weekend every week. At least 2 days a week I must be in the office My wife said ‘fuck that, be a house husband and make me sandwiches’
